source: Kenneth van Surksum — CA Baseline October 2025

policies.name: Block Legacy Authentication for All users when OtherClients
policies.fullName: CAP001-All Block Legacy Authentication for All users when OtherClients-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks legacy authentication protocols that bypass Conditional Access and MFA. Deploy this policy first as a foundation.

policies.name: Block Exchange ActiveSync Clients for All users
policies.fullName: CAP002-All Block Exchange ActiveSync Clients for All users-v1.1
policies.description: Blocks Exchange ActiveSync connections which use legacy authentication.

policies.name: Block device code authentication flow
policies.fullName: CAP003-All Block device code authentication flow-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks device code flow which can be abused in phishing attacks to authenticate on behalf of users.

policies.name: Block authentication transfer
policies.fullName: CAP004-All Block authentication transfer-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks authentication transfer flow to prevent token theft via companion app attacks.

policies.name: Grant macOS access for All users when Modern Auth Clients and Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD001-O365 Grant macOS access for All users when Modern Auth Clients and Compliant-v1.1
policies.description: Requires macOS devices to be compliant to access Office 365 applications via modern auth clients.

policies.name: Grant Windows access for All users when Modern Auth Clients and Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD002-O365 Grant Windows access for All users when Modern Auth Clients and Compliant-v1.1
policies.description: Requires Windows devices to be compliant or Hybrid Azure AD joined to access Office 365.

policies.name: Grant iOS and Android access for All users when Modern Auth Clients and AppProPol or Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD003-O365 Grant iOS and Android access for All users when Modern Auth Clients and AppProPol or Compliant-v1.3
policies.description: Requires iOS and Android devices to use approved apps with app protection policy or be compliant.

policies.name: Grant Browser access for All users when Browser and Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD004-All Grant Browser access for All users when Browser and Compliant-v1.0
policies.description: Requires device compliance for browser-based access to all applications.

policies.name: Block access for unsupported device platforms for All users when Modern Auth Clients
policies.fullName: CAD005-O365 Block access for unsupported device platforms for All users when Modern Auth Clients-v1.1
policies.description: Blocks access from unsupported or unknown device platforms to Office 365.

policies.name: Session block download on unmanaged device for All users when Browser and Modern App Clients and Non-Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD006-O365 Session block download on unmanaged device for All users when Browser and Modern App Clients and Non-Compliant-v1.5
policies.description: Uses session controls to block file downloads from unmanaged or non-compliant devices accessing Office 365.

policies.name: Session set Sign-in Frequency for Apps for All users when Modern Auth Clients and Non-Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD007-O365 Session set Sign-in Frequency for Apps for All users when Modern Auth Clients and Non-Compliant-v1.2
policies.description: Sets sign-in frequency for non-compliant devices accessing Office 365 desktop clients.

policies.name: Session set Sign-in Frequency for All users when Browser and Non-Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD008-All Session set Sign-in Frequency for All users when Browser and Non-Compliant-v1.1
policies.description: Sets sign-in frequency for browser sessions on non-compliant devices.

policies.name: Session disable browser persistence for All users when Browser and Non-Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD009-All Session disable browser persistence for All users when Browser and Non-Compliant-v1.2
policies.description: Disables persistent browser sessions on non-compliant devices to force re-authentication.

policies.name: Require MFA for device join or registration when Browser and Modern Auth Clients
policies.fullName: CAD010-RJD Require MFA for device join or registration when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.1
policies.description: Requires MFA before a device can be registered or joined to Entra ID, preventing unauthorized device registration.

policies.name: Grant Linux access for All users when Modern Auth Clients and Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD011-O365 Grant Linux access for All users when Modern Auth Clients and Compliant-v1.0
policies.description: Requires Linux devices to be compliant to access Office 365.

policies.name: Grant access for Admin users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients and Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD012-All Grant access for Admin users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients and Compliant-v1.1
policies.description: Requires administrators to use compliant or Hybrid Azure AD joined devices for all applications.

policies.name: Block access for Admin users when Mobile Platforms
policies.fullName: CAD013-All Block access for Admin users when Mobile Platforms-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks administrator access from mobile device platforms (iOS/Android).

policies.name: Require App Protection Policy for Edge on Windows for All users when Browser and Non-Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD014-O365 Require App Protection Policy for Edge on Windows for All users when Browser and Non-Compliant-v1.0
policies.description: Requires app protection policy for Microsoft Edge browser on Windows for non-compliant devices.

policies.name: Grant access for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients and Compliant on Windows and macOS
policies.fullName: CAD015-All Grant access for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients and Compliant on Windows and macOS-v1.0
policies.description: Requires compliant or Hybrid Azure AD joined Windows and macOS devices for browser and desktop client access to all applications.

policies.name: Require token protection for desktop sessions on Windows
policies.fullName: CAD016-All Require token protection for desktop sessions on Windows-v1.0
policies.description: Enforces token protection (token binding) for Windows desktop sessions to prevent token theft and replay attacks.

policies.name: Grant Windows 365 Cloud PC access for All users when Compliant
policies.fullName: CAD017-CloudPC Grant Windows 365 Cloud PC access for All users when Compliant-v1.0
policies.description: Requires compliant devices to access Windows 365 Cloud PC workloads.

policies.name: Session controls for Windows 365 Cloud PC access for All users
policies.fullName: CAD018-CloudPC Session controls for Windows 365 Cloud PC access for All users-v1.0
policies.description: Applies session controls (sign-in frequency, persistent browser) to Windows 365 Cloud PC sessions.

policies.name: Require compliant network for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients
policies.fullName: CAD019-All Require compliant network for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Requires devices to be on a compliant network (Global Secure Access) for access.

policies.name: Block access from high-risk countries for All users
policies.fullName: CAL001-All Block access from high-risk countries for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks access from countries/regions identified as high risk. Requires named locations to be configured.

policies.name: Require MFA registration from trusted locations only for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients
policies.fullName: CAL002-RSI Require MFA registration from trusted locations only for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.4
policies.description: Requires MFA for security information registration from non-trusted networks to prevent MFA registration abuse.

policies.name: Block Access for Specified Service Accounts except from Provided Trusted Locations
policies.fullName: CAL003-All Block Access for Specified Service Accounts except from Provided Trusted Locations when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.1
policies.description: Restricts service accounts to only authenticate from trusted locations.

policies.name: Block access for Admins from non-trusted locations
policies.fullName: CAL004-All Block access for Admins from non-trusted locations when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.2
policies.description: Blocks administrator access from non-trusted locations to reduce risk of compromised admin credentials being used remotely.

policies.name: Require MFA from non-trusted locations for All users
policies.fullName: CAL005-All Require MFA from non-trusted locations for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Requires MFA when accessing from outside trusted locations.

policies.name: Block access for All users from blocked countries
policies.fullName: CAL006-All Block access for All users from blocked countries when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks access from specific countries/regions using named location definitions.

policies.name: Grant Require MFA for guests when Browser and Modern Auth Clients
policies.fullName: CAU001-All Grant Require MFA for guests when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.1
policies.description: Requires multi-factor authentication for all guest/external users.

policies.name: Grant Require MFA for guests for Azure AD app
policies.fullName: CAU001A-Selected Grant Require MFA for guests when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Requires MFA for guests accessing the legacy Azure AD application specifically.

policies.name: Grant Require MFA for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients
policies.fullName: CAU002-All Grant Require MFA for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.5
policies.description: Requires MFA for all users using authentication strength. This is the foundational MFA policy.

policies.name: Block unapproved apps for guests when Browser and Modern Auth Clients
policies.fullName: CAU003-Selected Block unapproved apps for guests when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks guest access to applications not specifically approved for external collaboration.

policies.name: Session route through MDCA for All users when Browser
policies.fullName: CAU004-Selected Session route through MDCA for All users when Browser-v1.0
policies.description: Routes browser sessions through Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps for session monitoring and control.

policies.name: Session route through MDCA for All users when Browser on Compliant
policies.fullName: CAU005-Selected Session route through MDCA for All users when Browser on Compliant-v1.1
policies.description: Routes browser sessions through MDCA for compliant devices to enable session monitoring.

policies.name: Grant access for Medium and High Risk Sign-in for All Users require MFA
policies.fullName: CAU006-All Grant access for Medium and High Risk Sign-in for All Users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients require MFA-v1.4
policies.description: Requires MFA when a sign-in is classified as medium or high risk by Entra ID Protection.

policies.name: Grant access for Medium and High Risk Users require password reset
policies.fullName: CAU007-All Grant access for Medium and High Risk Users for All Users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients require PWD reset-v1.3
policies.description: Requires MFA and password change when a user account is classified as medium or high risk by Entra ID Protection.

policies.name: Grant Require Phishing Resistant MFA for Admins
policies.fullName: CAU008-All Grant Require Phishing Resistant MFA for Admins when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.4
policies.description: Requires phishing-resistant MFA (FIDO2, Windows Hello, certificate-based) for all administrators.

policies.name: Grant Require MFA for Admin Portals for All Users
policies.fullName: CAU009-Management Grant Require MFA for Admin Portals for All Users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.2
policies.description: Requires MFA (via authentication strength) for access to Microsoft admin portals and Azure management.

policies.name: Require Terms of Use for All users
policies.fullName: CAU010-All Require Terms of Use for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Requires users to accept Terms of Use before accessing applications.

policies.name: Block access for All users except licensed when Browser and Modern Auth Clients
policies.fullName: CAU011-All Block access for All users except licensed when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks access for unlicensed users (except guests) to prevent unauthorized resource consumption.

policies.name: Combined Security Info Registration with TAP
policies.fullName: CAU012-RSI Combined Security Info Registration with TAP-v1.1
policies.description: Requires MFA for security info registration, supporting Temporary Access Pass for initial registration.

policies.name: Grant Require phishing resistant MFA for All users
policies.fullName: CAU013-All Grant Require phishing resistant MFA for All users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Extends phishing-resistant MFA requirement to all users (not just admins). Requires full rollout of phishing-resistant methods.

policies.name: Block access for High Risk Service Principals
policies.fullName: CAU014-All Block access for High Risk Service Principals when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks service principals identified as high risk by workload identity protection.

policies.name: Block access for High Risk Sign-in for All Users
policies.fullName: CAU015-All Block access for High Risk Sign-in for All Users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks access for high risk sign-ins instead of just requiring MFA (stricter than CAU006).

policies.name: Block access for High Risk Users for All Users
policies.fullName: CAU016-All Block access for High Risk Users for All Users when Browser and Modern Auth Clients-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks access for high risk user accounts until remediation (stricter than CAU007).

policies.name: Session set Sign-in Frequency for Admins when Browser
policies.fullName: CAU017-All Session set Sign-in Frequency for Admins when Browser-v1.0
policies.description: Enforces a shorter sign-in frequency for administrators using browser sessions.

policies.name: Session disable browser persistence for Admins when Browser
policies.fullName: CAU018-All Session disable browser persistence for Admins when Browser-v1.0
policies.description: Disables persistent browser sessions for administrators to require re-authentication.

policies.name: Block access for All users when Insider Risk is Elevated
policies.fullName: CAU019-All Block access for All users when Insider Risk is Elevated-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks or restricts access for users flagged with elevated insider risk by Microsoft Purview.

policies.name: Block access for high-risk AI agent workload identities
policies.fullName: CAU020-All Block access for high-risk AI agent workload identities-v1.0
policies.description: Blocks AI agent workload identities classified as high risk by Entra ID Protection.
